caption: A man is centered within a small, rounded rectangular cutout against a solid black background. He is wearing a dark, patterned garment with light-colored accents on the shoulders and collar. He stands in a brightly lit interior space, looking directly at the camera with a slight smile. The man remains in a consistent pose across the sequence, with his hands clasped in front of him. The text "Seyi Adebola" appears in a small, white font in the bottom left and bottom center areas of the overall image. There are no significant changes in the man's expression, position, or the surrounding environment as the sequence progresses, resulting in a nearly static visual.
